A Contractor Who
Actually Shows Up

RW Turk Construction is a small, personal firm focused on home and small commercial remodeling. When you work with us, you work with us — not a revolving door of subs. Richard Turk and his team handle everything: demo, build, electrical, and plumbing. Your dream space, done right, done fast.

4× Nextdoor Neighborhood Favorite
3 Active Nevada Licenses (General, Electrical, Plumbing)
1 Team. Your whole project, start to finish.

What We Do

Full-Service Remodeling & Beyond

🏠

Home Remodeling

Kitchen and bathroom renovations built to your exact vision. We sit down with you, understand your space, and deliver custom results — not cookie-cutter.

⚡

Electrical Work

Licensed electrical services for any job — residential, commercial, indoor, outdoor, or automotive. No waiting on a separate crew. We handle it.

🔧

Plumbing

Licensed plumbing for kitchens, bathrooms, and beyond. From full remodels to standalone repairs — wherever the job is, we're there.

🏢

Small Commercial

Light commercial remodeling done with the same personal attention we bring to every home project. Businesses deserve quality work too.

🔨

Custom Builds

Almost everything we do is custom. We don't do off-the-shelf solutions. If you can dream it, we can build it — and we'll do it fast.

📋

On-Site Consultation

We come to your home, walk the space with you, and talk through your goals. No guesswork, no miscommunication — just a clear plan from day one.
